briefs.title: Tobacco and Vapour Product Warning Display Fine Updated in BC — Effective April 2026
briefs.summary: BC is updating the fine amount for failing to display required health warnings under the Tobacco and Vapour Products Control Regulation. The new fine level takes effect April 1, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review your tobacco and vapour product warning displays now to ensure they meet BC requirements before April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC updated tobacco/vapour warning display fine takes effect
